name: Service account with high privileges can be assumed by external principal
description: A service account with high privileges has a trust policy allowing principals from external organizations to assume it, enabling cross-account privilege escalation
conditions: iam_policy CONTAINS 'allUsers' OR iam_policy CONTAINS 'allAuthenticatedUsers' OR iam_policy CONTAINS 'domain:'
remediation: 1. Review and restrict the service account's IAM bindings. 2. Remove allUsers and allAuthenticatedUsers principals. 3. Limit cross-organization access to specific, trusted principals. 4. Enable domain restriction constraints.
